theme: Cron & maintenance — rejalashtirilgan ishlar, backup, tozalash (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Joriy cron ishlari
steps: Joriy cron ishlarini yoz:  crontab -l > current.txt 2>/dev/null || echo '(bosh)' > current.txt

tasks.title: Sana formati (backup nomi)
tasks.why: Backup fayllar sana bilan nomlanadi: date +%F → 2026-06-09.
steps: Bugungi sanani YYYY-MM-DD formatда yoz:  date +%F > today.txt

tasks.title: Har daqiqa
steps: everymin.txt ga 'har daqiqa' cron yozuvini yoz:

tasks.title: Har dushanba 09:00
steps: weekly.txt ga yoz:  echo '0 9 * * 1 echo dushanba' > weekly.txt

tasks.title: Backup skripti (sana bilan)
tasks.why: Sana bilan nomlangan backup — maintenance asosi.
steps: backup.sh yoz: backups/ papka yaratib, /etc/hostname ni sana bilan nusxa qilsin

tasks.title: Backup uchun cron yozuv
tasks.why: backup.sh ni har kuni 02:00 da ishga tushiradigan cron qatori.
steps: cronjob.txt ga to'liq cron qatorini yoz (backup.sh ni har kuni 2:00 da):

tasks.title: Eski loglarni tozalash
tasks.why: Log rotation: find -mtime bilan eski fayllarni topish/o'chirish.
steps: cleanup.sh yoz: /tmp dagi 7 kundan eski .log fayllarni topadigan find:

tasks.title: Maintenance log
tasks.why: Har ish bajarilganда sana bilan logга yozish.
steps: Logга sana bilan qator qo'sh:  echo "$(date +%F) ish bajarildi" >> run.log

tasks.title: Day-8 robust backup
tasks.why: Day-8 set -e + argument: xatoga chidamli backup skript.
steps: cb/rbackup.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash, set -e): $1 faylni cb/copy.txt ga nusxa qilsin (default /etc/hostname)

tasks.title: Day-3 ps health-log
tasks.why: Day-3 ps + maintenance: jarayonlar sonini sana bilan logга yoz.

tasks.title: Backup skripti
tasks.why: maint/bin/backup.sh — sana bilan papka yaratib nusxa qiladi.
steps: maint/bin/backup.sh yoz (#!/bin/bash): maint/backups/bk-<sana> papka yaratib, /etc/hostname ni qo'ysin

tasks.title: Cron yozuvini saqla
tasks.why: Backup.sh ni har kuni avtomatik ishlatadigan cron qatori.
steps: maint/crontab.txt ga backup.sh ni har kuni 1:30 da ishlatadigan cron qatorini yoz:

tasks.title: Ishga tushir + logla
tasks.why: Yakuniy: backup'ni ishlatib, natijani logга yozish.
steps: bash maint/bin/backup.sh && echo "$(date +%F) backup OK" >> maint/logs/backup.log

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: cron'ning 5 maydonini + nega backup avtomatik bo'lishi kerakligini ustozга ayt
